details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest inshore half-day morning Miami charter (4.5+ rating, bait included, 4 anglers)
Task 2: Book full-day offshore tuna in San Diego with boat length filter, price range, rating, and extras
Task 3: Save three top-rated charters to favorites and open one from favorites list
Task 4: Compare two charters and book the one with more included amenities for 3 anglers
Task 5: Book cheapest 3–4 hour trip in Miami for 2 anglers
Task 6: Log in and modify an existing booking (date, group size, add extra)
Task 7: Message lowest-priced captain among top-rated tuna charters in San Diego
Task 8: Flexible dates - book cheapest inshore 4–6 hr trip in Miami (Oct 1–7, keep catch)
Task 9: Add two weekend trips to cart, apply WEEKEND10, and proceed to payment summary
